bug_summary: Text glow BLImage composite at canvas right edge clips pixels past fb.width when text positioned near edge with large glow radius (composite_bl_image at offset raster.x_offset - padding exceeds fb.width)
fix_summary: Pre-clip bbox WARN log when composite offset extends past framebuffer bounds; safe-clamp x,y to canvas inside. Avoids hard clipping while surfacing the diagnosis for future maintainers.

timing_basis: self-reported post-hoc rationale per code-reviewer MINOR-2 (VPS env blocked)
bug_summary: overlay_diagnostic_panels.cpp metrics/text panels use TextPlacementKind::Absolute with hardcoded top-left pixel offset (panel_x/panel_y=10.0f) that does not inherit parent layer translation; when scene root transform shifts or pixel-density changes, the diagnostic text drifts off-target by cumulative transform deltas (observed in widget previews at ~400px offset from intended canvas-relative top-left).
bug_evidence: src/scene/camera/overlay_diagnostic_panels.cpp metrics panel block (~lines 156-162) forcing Absolute panel_x/panel_y at 10.0f ignoring parent layer transform
fix_summary: Replace TextPlacementKind::Absolute with relative anchoring (TextPlacementKind::TopLeftWithMargin) and ensure panel placement inherits parent LayerBuilder::translate so HUD text tracks scene origin across viewport changes.
